title: Tameable Mobs
description: This Datapack adds taming for any mob
body:
# **Tameable Mobs**
![Tameable mobs' banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a368119127d81af3035ae5313ccbf164dfdb325.png)

### Short Description:
This Datapack adds a Loyalty Totem, This Totem allows us to tame any mob, passive or aggressive, aggressive mobs will attack untamed aggressive mobs and passive tamed mobs can be ridden.

<details>
<summary>More detail</summary>
Maybe taming the guard is OP, but.... In this datapack you need to make 4 Totem of Loyalty Shards and 1 glued apple, how do you do it.... To make a glued apple, you only need two things: a golden apple and a honeycomb.... The shard, however, is more difficult.... you need a nether star, a sculk block, 2 gold ingots and lapis lazuli. To create a Totem of Loyalty, you need to throw 4 shards and a glued apple on the ground. You may ask “Why? Cam't we just use the crafting table”, yeah... minecraft does not see the difference between normal iron nuggets, and my custom item, if I used the crafting table you would be just able to use a iron nugget to craft the Totem of Loyalty, yeah... you can use 9 shards to make a iron ingot :(

Ok so you have the totem now, but how to use it, just stand next to a mob and right click on it while holding the totem, and the mob would get tamed

the agressive mobs are going to attack the agrassive untamed mobs, and you can stand next to a tamed passive mob and click shift for one tick, because if you hold it for 2 ticks you would sit on the mob, and instantly get off it, but if you would click it for 1 tick you would ride the mob


<details>
<summary>bonus information</summary>
It also adds two entity type tags, #kotamo:aggressive and #kotamo:you_would_not_say_that_they_are_a_mob
